title: Minimal Fashion Magazine Cover AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Fashion Magazine Cover AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Minimal luxury fashion magazine cover for VOGUE, built around a vertical split composition and a refined half-body editorial portrait. Subject: 画面纵向分割： 左侧为纯白背景，叠加超大黑色字体“VOGUE”，字体贯穿整个画面。 stands in the right-side portrait zone wearing tailored black suit and sculptural earrings, with elegant posture, cool high-fashion restraint, and advertising-grade editorial presence. Scene: Left side is a pure white field dominated by huge black VOGUE typography running through the frame; right side is a deep green background holding the model portrait and a small premium English tagline near the top right. Composition: Fixed vertical magazine-cover layout: clean left white column with oversized cover-title lettering, right deep-green portrait panel, half-body model placed on the right, strong negative space, and cover-ready hierarchy. Signature Elements: Vertical split cover, pure white title field, deep green portrait field, huge VOGUE, 画面纵向分割： 左侧为纯白背景，叠加超大黑色字体“VOGUE”，字体贯穿整个画面。, tailored black suit and sculptural earrings, elegant pose, strong shadows, and luxury editorial magazine composition. Style: Minimal high-fashion editorial cover with luxury brand visual discipline, cold refined mood, strong studio shadows, Helvetica-like layout control, and ultra-polished 8K magazine finish. Color Palette: Pure white left field, oversized black title type, deep green right background, restrained fashion neutrals from tailored black suit and sculptural earrings, controlled skin tones, and crisp high-contrast accents. Lighting: Premium studio lighting with strong contrast shadows, sculpted facial and wardrobe highlights, clean background separation, and cool editorial depth. Camera: Half-body fashion portrait crop, straight magazine-cover viewpoint, composed posture, sharp facial clarity, and enough room for oversized typography. Typography: VOGUE appears as huge readable black cover typography on the left; the upper-right English tagline stays short, premium, and legible in a Helvetica-style system. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
